metadata.name: ww-image
metadata.description: An image element with customizable sizing, overlays, filters, and lazy loading support.

properties.name: url
properties.description: Image source URL. Urls from the project images should be formatted as `designs/<projectId>/sections/<file_name>?_wwcv=<number>`. Respect the exact url returned by the project images search, even if it does not contain an http prefix.

properties.name: objectFit
properties.description: How the image should fit its container. Use cover by default to prevent stretching.

properties.name: overlay
properties.description: CSS color or gradient overlay on the image

properties.name: alt
properties.description: Alternative text for accessibility. Supports multiple languages.

specifications: Use valid Unsplash URLs for image sources when needed
Optimize image dimensions to 2000x2000px or smaller
Set objectFit to cover by default to prevent stretched images
Alt text should always be provided for accessibility
